title: my first time in italy 🍋 a week in amalfi coast & sorrento, girls trip, beaches & lots of food
description:

Hello Friends!

for the entirety of my summer break (all of 8 days) i went to ITALIA 🇮🇹 !! it was my FIRST time in europe and i chose italy because i have heard so many great things about the food, beaches, culture etc. so i tried my best this week to experience it all 🍋 this is the vlog of my annual girls trip with @LaniPliopa and it is JAM PACKED: we stayed in
